testcase.name: Moving right should advance the head by one cell on the X axis
Snake growing multiple times in sequence should add one segment per growth
Snake should grow by one segment on the move right after eating
Setting the exact opposite direction should be ignored (no 180-degree turn)
Multiple consecutive moves should advance the head correctly
Setting the same direction again should have no negative effect
Snake moving up should increase Y and keep X unchanged
New snake should start with a single body segment at its initial position
Snake should preserve its old tail position correctly while growing
Setting a perpendicular direction should change the snake's heading
Growth flag should only apply to a single move, not persist
Snake should keep the same length when moving without eating
